business_ideas.idea: Indeed First Said: Twitter account tracking newly-created job titles and roles on job boards
Nuuly model applied to other categories: rental/subscription for product categories with high returns
Real estate monetization guide: aggregate all ways to earn income from property (solar, tower, surf cam)
Competitive intelligence aggregator: track job postings, hires, roles at competitor companies
Firefly/advertising networks: monetize dead space (rideshare vehicles) with targeted ads
Recruitment via puzzles: MSCHF-style challenges to identify top talent for hiring
Rock Returns: reverse logistics and return processing as service for e-commerce brands
Spring Loading: insider trading signal tracker for stock grant changes at companies
Penny Hoarder model: comprehensive guide to all available side hustles and gig work

predictions.text: New job categories will continuously emerge as economy evolves and specializes
Rental and subscription models will expand beyond clothing to most consumer categories
Insider stock grant trends are predictive indicator of company strategic direction and success
